meaning: n.游泳,漂浮,潮流,眼花adj.游泳时穿戴的vi.游泳,游,漂浮,旋转,覆盖,充溢,眩晕,浸vt.游过,使浮起adj.游泳时穿戴的
examples: I managed to swim to safety.
I think I'll go for a swim.
I had a swim to cool down.
I've been training hard and this will be my last chance to swim well this year.
En route, there are opportunities to swim in natural pools and spot dolphins in the Indian Ocean.
